turns.user_message: I tried to shake it off today, but it didn't work. I just feel flat and heavy.
I keep trying to pep talk myself every morning, and it never sticks. The fog just rolls back in.
I can't even remember what feeling okay was like anymore. My own attempts to feel better just make it worse.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This has been going on for a while.
